title: Remove duplicate base_url set from args

comments.body: probably need to fix also readme?

@sshnaidm Good catch. Thank you for your PR. There are a number of places I gave examples and didn't include the keyword `base_url` if you could search and fix them all that would be great! 

Fingers crossed @cevich will have a quick fix for the CI issue.

@sshnaidm I missed that you had not signed this PR. Please do, see below if you do not know how.

```
git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force
```
